? Microsoft made Copilot a co-author on every VS Code project, reverted after developers revolted

? Deepseek nears $45 billion valuation as China's state chip fund leads round

*The Essentials:*

? Anthropic will let its managed agents dream

( https://edc77.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGEmAq8heCqEcThKGmzI/YiEemjMPbT-c )

* Anthropic has announced an expansion of its Managed Agents platform, introducing features such as 'dreaming' and outcomes-based evaluation, now available in public beta.
* These enhancements aim to improve the agents' capabilities by allowing them to process recent work and learn from it, similar to human memory consolidation during sleep.
* The introduction of multi-agent orchestration and outcomes evaluation is expected to enhance task performance, with initial tests showing up to a 10-point improvement in success rates.

? Google speeds up Gemma 4 threefold with multi-token prediction

( https://edc77.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGLdcyxepMziiJ04F5ZY/38bZSp2arwDv )

* Google has introduced multi-token prediction technology for its Gemma 4 AI model, achieving a threefold increase in text generation speed.
* This advancement addresses inefficiencies in traditional language models, which typically generate text one token at a time, causing delays as they wait for data.
* The new technology is expected to enhance user experience across various platforms, including smartphones and cloud applications, and is available under an open license.

? Microsoft made Copilot a co-author on every VS Code project, reverted after developers revolted

( https://edc77.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGSV57mc0X9Co8IoDO9o/x5meQT3yqeUt )

* Microsoft recently attempted to designate Copilot as a co-author on all Visual Studio Code projects, a move that faced significant backlash from developers. The company has since retracted this change.
* The decision was attributed to a bug that went unnoticed during testing. Developers criticized the integration as intrusive, expressing concerns over its impact on coding practices and project ownership.
* In response to the backlash, Microsoft plans to implement a revised attribution system that requires user consent for Copilot's involvement, aiming to restore trust among its developer community.

? Deepseek nears $45 billion valuation as China's state chip fund leads round

( https://edc77.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGZMXGbZBhIgtxbYBgk4/tDjJub8yg7qZ )

* Deepseek is approaching a valuation of $45 billion as it enters a funding round led by China's state chip fund, the China Integrated Circuit Industry Investment Fund.
* This funding round marks a significant increase from a previous valuation of $20 billion, driven by interest from major investors like Tencent and the founder's personal investment.
* The outcome of this funding could strengthen Deepseek's position in the semiconductor industry and influence future investments in AI technology within China.

? CopilotKit Introduces Enterprise Intelligence Platform That Gives Agentic Applications Persistent Memory Across Sessions and Devices

( https://edc77.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGgDzPQWMrSAzmuI9zKK/u_GWOB_vO_JW )

* CopilotKit has launched an Enterprise Intelligence Platform designed to provide agentic applications with persistent memory across sessions and devices, addressing a common limitation in current applications.
* This platform offers a managed infrastructure layer that automatically handles state and memory, eliminating the need for development teams to create custom storage solutions for their applications.
* The introduction of this platform is expected to enhance user experience by allowing seamless continuation of workflows, with future updates planned to include analytics and self-improvement features.

? Nvidia partners with Corning to build the fiber optic backbone for next-gen AI data centers

( https://edc77.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGn5RYFTY1bf5cD28Hua/8SMM8BoPj6s5 )

* Nvidia has entered a multi-year partnership with Corning to develop the fiber optic infrastructure for advanced AI data centers. This collaboration aims to enhance optical technology manufacturing in the U.S.
* The agreement will see Corning establish three new production facilities in Texas and North Carolina, significantly increasing its optical connectivity manufacturing capacity to meet the growing demands of AI workloads.
* The partnership is expected to create over 3,000 jobs and boost stock values for both companies, reflecting strong market confidence in the future of AI infrastructure development.

? Google's AI search results will now turn to Reddit for expert advice

( https://edc77.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGtwth4QjBl9BRVm6aUq/xUD0HS1FKepf )

* Google has announced that its AI search results will now incorporate insights from Reddit and other social media platforms, providing users with firsthand accounts and expert advice in a new section.
* This update aims to enhance the relevance of search results by integrating diverse perspectives, reflecting a shift towards valuing community-driven content alongside traditional sources.
* Reactions to this change suggest it may improve user engagement, although concerns remain about the impact on established publications and the overall quality of information presented.
